alignments.candidate_evidence: Eight years at Google scaling global commercial operations and transformation programs with two promotions; product operations and business transformation ownership across multiple regions
alignments.job_requirement: Define and own the end-to-end transformation roadmap for Finance, covering both systems and processes

alignments.candidate_evidence: Designs and specs LLM coding agents to build production systems; owns evaluation methodology, benchmarking and calibration; directs system architecture decisions
alignments.job_requirement: Architect the future finance systems landscape, mapping current vs. future state and planning the transition; weigh build-versus-buy choices

alignments.candidate_evidence: Managed Salesforce admin territory budgets and partnered with engineering on feature requests; cross-functional stakeholder alignment and change delivery in high-growth contexts
alignments.job_requirement: Partner with Finance, Technology, and Business teams to evaluate, select, and implement systems and automation solutions

alignments.candidate_evidence: Scaled global commercial operations transformation programs; led cross-functional change delivery and user adoption in large-scale rollouts; product-leader mindset for iterative value
alignments.job_requirement: Lead change management and upskilling initiatives to enable adoption of new tools and processes across global finance teams

alignments.candidate_evidence: Advanced Excel and Sheets; builds Looker dashboards; proficient SQL including joins, GROUP BY, subqueries, window functions; BigQuery data pulling and shaping; quantifies transformation impact
alignments.job_requirement: Track, measure, and communicate outcomes of transformation initiatives with clear business cases and accountability

alignments.candidate_evidence: Product Operations and Strategy background; demonstrated ability to influence senior stakeholders and drive cross-functional alignment in ambiguous, high-growth contexts
alignments.job_requirement: Serve as strategic advisor to broader leadership team on elevating Finance into a competitive advantage

gaps.gap: No direct finance systems implementation experience (SAP, Oracle, NetSuite) or hands-on platform selection at enterprise scale
gaps.mitigation: Strong systems architecture and build-vs-buy judgment foundation; rapid upskilling in finance-specific ERP tooling is feasible with domain partnership; prior platform evaluation experience translates

gaps.gap: Limited direct consulting or Big Four/top-tier consulting background; experience is primarily within one org (Google)
gaps.mitigation: Transformation delivery, stakeholder alignment, and change management are transferable; consulting brand not essential for execution-heavy role; advisory thinking and cross-functional problem-solving are demonstrated

gaps.gap: No stated direct experience with IPO-ready, SOX-compliance, or cross-border finance control frameworks
gaps.mitigation: Governance, control, and scalability mindset are present; specific compliance domain knowledge can be developed on the job with guidance from Head of Strategic Finance and finance leadership

gaps.gap: Finance domain entry is steep—background is Commercial/Product Operations, not finance operations or FP&A
gaps.mitigation: Core transformation, process redesign, and technology orchestration skills are domain-agnostic; finance acumen grows quickly in execution role; strategic advisor positioning and finance leadership partnership are built into role

output.level_rationale: Role requires 6+ years in digital transformation/enterprise systems with architecture and delivery scope. Reporting directly to Head of Strategic Finance at a funded fintech scales this to L5 (strong IC ownership, cross-functional leadership, end-to-end program accountability). No manager-of-managers or director-title expectation stated, so L6 is not supported. Bachelor's requirement is met. company size ($8B, 2,200+ employees, post-Series funding) and transformation scope anchor an L5 role.
output.summary: Strong strategic transformation and change-delivery backbone; advanced data and automation tooling (SQL, BigQuery, Looker, agentic systems); proven ability to scale cross-functional programs and influence senior stakeholders. Main gap is lack of direct finance-systems and consulting domain expertise, plus limited IPO/SOX/cross-border compliance context. Core transformation muscle is intact and portable; finance-specific knowledge is learnable in partnership with Head of Strategic Finance. Recommend for consider—fit is real but domain entry curve is material.
uncertainties: Extent of familiarity with procure-to-pay, order-to-cash, and record-to-report process mechanics—profile does not detail finance workflow depth
Depth of product operations experience in platforms/systems vs. commercial/go-to-market ops; may skew toward demand-side rather than finance tech
Specific data-architecture and BI governance experience in regulated or IPO-stage environments not explicitly stated
Appetite for domain shift from payments/commercial operations to core finance technology transformation
